scope: The spec resolve filesâ†’requirements command and its --req reverse query. Belongs here: fileâ†’requirement mapping; the --req reverse tag-site query; path-containment normalization. Does not belong here: full-text search (â†’ QURY). Boundary case: an absolute path resolving outside platformDir is an RSLV exit-2 contract, never a silent [].

requirements.statement: spec resolve maps file paths to the requirements tagged in them, with coverage.
requirements.why: Routes a task to its requirements (agent routing).

requirements.statement: spec resolve --json emits byte-identical output across consecutive invocations on an unchanged tree (deterministic ordering).
requirements.why: Non-deterministic output would break diff/snapshot consumers and the CI gates that compare it.
